ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drug_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drug category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique alphanumeric code for each drug category */,
  "therapeutic_area" TEXT /* Therapeutic area or disease the drug category treats */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the drug category was first approved by regulatory bodies */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the drug category is currently active in the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales data entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drug category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the sales occurred */,
  "current_sales" TEXT /* Current sales value for the drug category */,
  "previous_sales" TEXT /* Previous sales value for the drug category */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of sales for the drug category */,
  "market_share" TEXT /* Market share of the drug category */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales data entry */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of units sold */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue generated from the sales */,
  "profit_margin" TEXT /* Profit margin for the sales */,
  "customer_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic data of the customers */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marketing campaign associated with the sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES drug_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "healthcare_spending" TEXT /* Average healthcare spending per capita in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, marketing analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast data entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drug category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for the forecast */,
  "forecasted_sales" TEXT /* Forecasted sales value for the drug category */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for forecasting (e.g., linear regression, ARIMA) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the forecast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the forecast was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES drug_categories ("category_id")
)
